name: Social MCP
description: Connect OpenClaw to Bilibili, Weibo, Xiaohongshu, and Douyin MCP servers for social content retrieval.

weiboUrl.description: Streamable HTTP MCP endpoint for Weibo.

bilibiliCommand.description: Executable used to start the Bilibili MCP server.

bilibiliArgs.description: Arguments for the Bilibili MCP command.

xiaohongshuCommand.description: Executable used to start the Xiaohongshu MCP server.

xiaohongshuUrl.description: Streamable HTTP MCP endpoint for Xiaohongshu.

xiaohongshuArgs.description: Arguments for the Xiaohongshu MCP command.

douyinCommand.description: Executable used to start the Douyin MCP server.

douyinUrl.description: Streamable HTTP MCP endpoint for Douyin.

douyinArgs.description: Arguments for the Douyin MCP command.
